loStatement.text:
Minerva Partners is not just a Family Office.
It is the ecosystem where excellence converges,
that together can offer you the best solution
for your wealth.
loStatement.imageCaption: An ecosystem of professionals who share competencies, relationships and the satisfaction of an excellent result.

imageEcosistema.line1: Minerva Partners is not just a Family Office.
imageEcosistema.line2: It is the ecosystem where excellence converges, that together can offer you the best solution for your wealth.
imageEcosistema.line3: Professionals who have accepted a code of confidentiality and transparency. Who share competencies, relationships and the satisfaction of an excellent result.

1.title: AT THE CENTER OF EVERYTHING
1.text: Wealth in its entirety: business, real estate, finance, family, passions, future.

2.title: MINERVA HUB
2.text: The operational direction. M&A & Investments, Real Estate Advisory, Strategy Consulting, Wealth Management. What we do well, we do ourselves.

3.text: The best professionals, selected and coordinated. Legal, Tax, Banking, Insurance, Energy, Digital, International. All sign the Code.

4.title: MINERVA FRIENDS
4.text: The family's historical memory, specialists introduced by a Partner, competencies activated for specific projects.

5.title: THE COMPLETE ECOSYSTEM
5.text: Every role has a purpose. Every connection generates value. The result is greater than the sum of its parts.

homeEcosistema.closing1: Nothing is impossible, only the cost of waiting and not acting is very high; we don't seek the impossible: we join forces to deliver an excellent result.
homeEcosistema.closing2: WE WILL BE HERE TOMORROW TOO.

wallStreet.title: The discipline of execution.
wallStreet.text: Structured pipeline, rigorous stage gates, total accountability. Every operation follows a clear, measurable and results-oriented process.

ginevra.title: Discretion as an art form.
ginevra.text: Automatic NDAs, audit trails, controlled access. Your deal will never be "burned". Discretion is not an option: it is a founding principle.

londra.title: The speed of decisions.
londra.text: Workgroups in days, not months. A digital portal that accelerates every phase. Because in today's world, those who decide first decide best.

italia.title: The value of authentic relationships.
italia.text: We structure word-of-mouth without killing it. No algorithm will replace a handshake. Relationships are our true asset.

singapore.title: The global vision.
singapore.text: Italian competencies with international opportunities. Global capital with Italian excellence. A bridge between worlds that rarely speak to each other.

ispirazioni.label: THE INSPIRATIONS
ispirazioni.headline: The models that inspired us

r360.name: R360
r360.text: Membership network for $100M+ estates. Focus on legacy and purpose beyond wealth. Inspired our VERITAS model.

tiger21.name: TIGER 21
tiger21.text: Peer-to-peer learning and deal sharing. The value is in the network, not the product. Inspired Minerva Point Zero.

wigmore.name: Wigmore Association
wigmore.text: Network of 8 independent MFOs. Proof that the federated model works. Inspired our confederation architecture.

wren.name: Wren Investment Office
wren.text: Scaling geographically without opening offices, through partners. Inspired our Partner-as-a-Service model.

stonehage.name: Stonehage Fleming
stonehage.text: The benchmark for comprehensive services. Inspired the completeness of our ecosystem.

cresset.name: Cresset
cresset.text: Built by clients for clients. Proprietary deal club ecosystem. Inspired our Club Deal Minerva.

svizzera.name: Swiss banking tradition
svizzera.text: Discretion as a foundation, not an option. Inspired our Minerva Code.

ispirazioni.closing: Minerva is a rare hybrid: Advisory + Deal + Community with independent partners. Most platforms are only one of the three. Combining them is our blue ocean.
ispirazioni.source: Analysis of 50 comparable platforms, 4 strategic clusters

comeFunziona.label: HOW IT WORKS
comeFunziona.headline: The direction that was missing.
comeFunziona.subtitle: A system that assembles around the wealth. Not a catalog of services, but an integrated bespoke solution.

blocco1.label: THE UNIFIED MODEL
blocco1.text: Minerva doesn't sell individual services. It designs integrated bespoke solutions. Each solution is made of "bricks": some pre-established (Hub), others activated as needed (Partners, Friends). The direction is unique.

blocco2.label: THE HUB & SPOKE CONFEDERATION
blocco2.text: The wealth at the center. Competencies around it. The system assembles around it.

blocco3.label: THE NETWORK
blocco3.text: Three formats to cultivate relationships, generate opportunities and nurture the next generation.

circle.title: Minerva Circle
circle.desc: 8-10 events per year. Reserved gatherings among entrepreneurs, families and selected professionals.

pointZero.title: Point Zero
pointZero.desc: The most exclusive club in the ecosystem. Access by invitation. Where decisions take shape.

nextGen.title: Next Gen
nextGen.desc: Pathways for the next generation. Training, mentorship and first access to the ecosystem.

blocco4.label: THE CODE AND VERITAS
blocco4.text: Every professional signs the Minerva Code before operating. Three documents: Ethical, Remunerative, Operational. The decision filter: VERITAS.

blocco5.label: THE BOARD
blocco5.text: A selective space, accessible by invitation, where opportunities are shared on a blind basis.

blocco6.label: SKIN IN THE GAME
blocco6.text: When we propose opportunities, our interest is to participate actively. We share the risk. Minerva Fund: fed by setting aside a portion of equity partners' remuneration.
blocco6.subtext: The relationship transforms from advisory to co-responsibility.

atto1.label: ACT 1: THE DISPERSION
atto1.headline: The business model that worked for decades no longer works.
atto1.text: Margins have shrunk, complexity has exploded, markets move ever faster. Today, everything is difficult, wasted time, pointless processes and systemic inefficiencies.

col1.title: Mandates that never close
col1.text: Too many advisors take on assignments they cannot complete.

col2.title: Unverified information
col2.text: Anyone can claim to have a deal, a contact, an investor.

col3.title: Opaque fees
col3.text: In the traditional advisory world, no one knows who earns what.

atto2.label: ACT 2: THE FRAGMENTATION
atto2.text: For every problem, a professional is called in, a specialist: but this very specialisation fragments overall value. Each one looks at their piece and optimises it, without considering the decisions of others. So the picture never takes on the substance it should have.
atto2.counterText: An Italian entrepreneur with significant wealth has on average 5-7 professionals who don't communicate with each other.

atto3.label: ACT 3: THE DISSATISFACTION
atto3.text: The result? Dissatisfaction. Sometimes explicit, badly managed operations, fragmented wealth, traumatic generational transitions. Sometimes latent, that feeling that things are not in their place, that one could do better, that no one is looking at the full picture. That voice that says: 'My wealth deserves more.'
atto3.answer: Minerva Partners is not just a Family Office. It is the direction for the wealth.

pensiero.intro1: Minerva Partners is born from a conviction: the most important value of a family is not what it owns, but the ability to evolve what it has built.
pensiero.intro2: For this reason, our model assigns the client a dual role. On one hand, a recipient of strategic and wealth advisory; on the other, an active participant in an environment where opportunities, relationships and vision come together. A place conceived as a temple of opportunities, business and growth.

architettura.title: THE ARCHITECTURE
paragraphs: At the center exists the hub: four directives representing our distinctive competencies, **M&A, real estate, strategy consulting and wealth management**, integrated into a single design that reads wealth as a system.

Around the hub, Partners are activated with their most relevant verticals: legal, tax, industrial, energy, insurance, international, and the Friends, bearers of specialist skills, connections and unconventional perspectives.
The goal is not to offer services, but to outline each time **the best solution for that family**, at that moment, along that trajectory.

marketplace.title: THE RESERVED MARKETPLACE
paragraphs: This approach takes shape in a **reserved marketplace** that structures networking and makes it operational. A selective space, accessible by invitation, where opportunities of any type of private assets are shared on a blind basis, examined by qualified parties and developed by restricted working groups. Here networking becomes infrastructure and deal flow becomes process.
The client participates: they can explore, contribute, originate, invest, observe. The system grows because its members fuel it.

codice.title: THE MINERVA CODE
paragraphs: To ensure coherence, the **Minerva Code** exists: ethical, remunerative and operational, defining how we work together, how value is distributed and how conflicts are managed.

skin.title: SKIN IN THE GAME
paragraphs: A distinctive element is **skin in the game**. When we propose opportunities, our interest is to participate actively. By building solutions together, we share the risk. This transforms the relationship from advisory to co-responsibility.

custodia.title: STEWARDSHIP AND CONTINUITY
paragraphs: The model remains deliberately open. Needs evolve, generations change, opportunities transform: Minerva is built to adapt without losing identity, shaping the business together with the members of the ecosystem.

The common thread is the **sustainability of value stewardship**. To steward means to protect, grow, transmit and give meaning. To accompany decisions that do not belong to the short term, but to continuity.
Minerva does not position itself as an answer to a contingent need. It positions itself as a context where important decisions find space, time and quality to be made correctly.

pensiero.quote: Wealth deserves the same care as those who built it.
closing: Minerva is a shapeable structure: you will enter a system that learns, adapts and grows with you. Making better opportunities, more evolved conversations and more conscious trajectories possible.
Our work is not measured in completed transactions, but in the quality of choices that become possible over time.
And it is on this that we build every relationship.

marco.name: Marco Vittoni
marco.bio: Expert in M&A, corporate finance and strategic-operational advisory for SMEs and Mid Caps. Works alongside entrepreneurs, families and institutional investors. Former member of several investment banks in Italy and Switzerland. Successfully completed approximately 50 deals.
marco.formazione: Education: Master's degree in Management, Bocconi University. Bachelor's degree, University of Parma. eMBA, Universidade Católica Portuguesa, Lisbon.

enrico.name: Enrico Viganò
enrico.bio: Chartered Accountant, operating at Studio Professionale Viganò Srl and Founder of Minerva Partners Srl. Holds governance roles as Board Member and CFO of investment Holdings and Joint-Stock Companies, as well as positions on boards of statutory auditors.
enrico.formazione: Education: Master's degree EADAP in Business Administration, University of Bergamo. Bachelor's degree, Bocconi University. Rotterdam School of Management.

contatti.label: CONTACT
contatti.headline: Let's talk.
contatti.subtitle: Whether exploring a partnership, presenting an opportunity, or simply understanding if Minerva is the right answer, we're here.

cta.nota: If you already know a Minerva member, ask them to introduce you. It's the best way to start.

hero.label: OUR FIELD
hero.headline: 14 sectors. 7 types of players.
hero.subheadline: We are not generalists. We are specialists of complexity.
hero.desc: We operate where wealth is complex, decisions carry weight and coordination makes the difference.

sectors.title: The sectors where we operate
sectors.subtitle: Every sector has its own rules, its own multiples, its own risks. We know them.

s01.title: Financial Services
s01.hover: Multiples: 8-15x EBITDA. Strict regulation. Consolidation underway. Frequent cross-border deals.

s02.title: Consumer Goods
s02.hover: Italian brands coveted globally. PE very active. Margins 8-15%. Complex supply chain.

s03.title: Aerospace & Defense
s03.hover: Strategic sector. Golden Power active. Premium multiples 12-20x. Institutional and government clients.

s04.title: Industrial Machinery
s04.hover: Heart of industrial Made in Italy. EBITDA 10-18%. Export 60%+. German and Asian buyers active.

s05.title: Chemicals
s05.hover: High barriers to entry. Patents and know-how. Critical ESG compliance. Multiples 7-12x.

s06.title: Technology
s06.desc: Software, SaaS, cybersecurity, AI, digital services
s06.hover: 20-40% YoY growth for the best. ARR-based valuation. Multiples 10-30x revenue. VC and PE very active.

s07.title: Infrastructure & Construction
s07.desc: Major works, specialized construction, plant engineering
s07.hover: NRRP €200+ billion. Multi-year backlog. Consolidation needed. Margins 5-10%.

s08.title: Metallurgical Industry
s08.hover: High cyclicality. Energy-intensive. Carbon price impact. Forced consolidation from ESG and costs.

s09.title: Oil & Gas
s09.hover: Energy transition underway. Stranded asset risk. But still enormous cashflows. Frequent corporate restructurings.

s10.title: Packaging
s10.desc: Paper converting, plastics, glass, luxury packaging
s10.hover: Italy European leader. Margins 8-14%. PE consolidators very active. ESG driver (plastic-free).

s11.title: Transportation
s11.hover: Container cost volatility. Digitalization. Rapid consolidation. Multiples 5-8x.

s12.title: Utilities & Renewables
s12.hover: Renewables boom. Long-term PPAs. Multiples 8-14x for regulated assets. Critical permitting pipeline.

s13.title: Agribusiness
s13.hover: Unique Italian heritage. Critical generational transition. Land as real asset. Growing exports.

s14.title: Healthcare & Pharma
s14.hover: Countercyclical resilience. Margins 15-25%. Clinic consolidation underway. PE very active.

s15.title: Real Estate & Hospitality
s15.desc: Real estate, development, asset management, hotel, resort
s15.hover: Core real assets for HNW. Yield 4–8%. Value tied to location and management. Strong institutional interest.

s16.title: Media & Entertainment
s16.desc: Content, production, rights, streaming, digital media
s16.hover: Growing content demand. Scalable models. Variable margins 10–30%. Strong competition and hit-driven.

s17.title: Sports
s17.desc: Clubs, events, media rights, infrastructure, performance
s17.hover: Iconic and relational assets. Revenue from rights and sponsorship. Unstable margins. Growing fund interest.

s18.title: Luxury & Fashion
s18.hover: Global brand heritage. Margins 20–35%. High pricing power. Strong strategic and PE appeal.

transition.desc: Minerva works with those who built, who invest, who manage, who inherit.

p01.title: Entrepreneurs
p01.subtitle: Those who built
p01.desc: The entrepreneur who dedicated decades to their company. Wealth grew with them: business, real estate, investments, family. But the system to manage all this hasn't kept pace. Too many advisors, no direction. 67% of their wealth is locked in business equity.
p01.services: M&A advisory · Exit planning · Wealth structuring · Governance · Generational transition · Club Deal · Post-exit wealth management

p02.title: Families
p02.subtitle: Those who protect and transmit
p02.desc: Families with multi-generational wealth: businesses, properties, holdings, income. Often with multiple branches, multiple interests, multiple visions. Family governance is absent or informal. Decisions are made at the Christmas dinner table. 70% don't survive the second generation.
p02.services: Family governance · Family constitution · Mediation · Next Gen <> Gen Exit · Personal family office · Asset protection

p03.title: Investment Funds
p03.subtitle: Those who invest to grow
p03.desc: Private equity, venture capital, private debt funds. They seek qualified deal flow, off-market access, co-investment with aligned entrepreneurs. Italy has 207,000 mid-market SMEs: fertile ground for those who know where to look and who to work with. Minerva is the bridge.
p03.services: Deal origination · Buy-side advisory · Due diligence coordination · Club deal structuring · Co-investment · Exit strategy · Portfolio monitoring

p04.title: Asset Managers (SGR)
p04.subtitle: Those who manage for others
p04.desc: Asset management companies seeking alternative investment opportunities for their funds. Real estate, private equity, infrastructure. Minerva provides access to off-market deals, structuring of dedicated vehicles and qualified co-investment.
p04.services: Deal sourcing · SPV structuring · Alternative operations advisory · Due diligence · Club deal participation · Qualified co-investment

p05.title: Holdings
p05.subtitle: Those who coordinate and optimize
p05.desc: Family and industrial holdings managing portfolios of participations. Often grown without a unified strategy: opportunistic acquisitions, postponed disposals, unstructured governance. The holding's value is often less than the sum of its parts.
p05.services: Portfolio strategy · Structure optimization · Disposals and acquisitions · Governance · Asset valuation · Corporate restructuring

p06.title: Corporations
p06.subtitle: Those who operate and compete
p06.desc: Structured SpA and Srl facing extraordinary operations: M&A, capital raising, restructuring, financial partner entry. Management seeks an advisor who understands both the industrial and the financial and wealth side. A single point of contact.
p06.services: M&A sell-side and buy-side · Capital raising · Restructuring · Business plan · Fairness opinion · Post-deal integration · Negotiation support

p07.title: Institutional Investors
p07.subtitle: Those seeking quality and governance
p07.desc: Banking foundations, pension funds, insurance companies, structured family offices. They seek co-investment in Italian mid-market deals with clear governance, defined tickets and a partner with skin in the game. Direct access to deal flow with professional structuring.
p07.services: Qualified deal flow · Club deal with IC validation · SPV governance · Institutional reporting · Aligned co-investment · Italian alternatives advisory

hub.label: THE CORE
hub.headline: The team that holds everything together.
hub.subtitle: Four core competencies. One unified direction. What we do well, we do ourselves. For everything else, there are the Partners.

s01.title: M&A & Investments
s01.subtitle: Architects of transactions
s01.desc: We are not brokers. Every deal starts from a strategic question, not a mandate. From origination to closing, with a structured process validated by the Investment Committee.

s02.title: Real Estate Advisory
s02.subtitle: Off-market. Structured. Integrated.
s02.desc: The best deals are not on the market. We access opportunities that don't exist on portals. And we integrate them into the overall wealth.

s03.title: Strategy Consulting
s03.subtitle: The levers that matter.
s03.desc: Revenue, costs, margins, processes. Not theoretical consulting: hands-on intervention with measurable KPIs.
s03.barsNote: EBITDA from 8% to 14% — real case, food PMI

s04.title: Wealth Management
s04.subtitle: The relationship that protects value over time.
s04.desc: We don't build portfolios. We build strategies. Fee-only, 100% retrocession. No products to push.
s04.highlight: 80.6% of Italian advisory is commission-based. Ours is fee-only. 100% retrocession to the client.

footer.disclaimer: Every co-investment operation and every Club Deal is subject to prior validation by the Minerva Partners Investment Committee.

w5.desc: Opportunity to invest in originated deals.

s3.title: Code
s3.desc: Signing the Minerva Code and SLA

s4.title: Onboarding
s4.desc: Welcome session, portal access, first referral

soluzioni.headline: An approach. Not a catalogue.
soluzioni.subtitle: Every solution stems from the problem, not the product.

s1.title: THE SITUATION
s1.desc: Every estate is different. Every family is different. We start by listening.

s2.title: THE DIAGNOSIS
s2.desc: We map everything: business, real estate, finance, family, existing professionals. We identify problems and opportunities.

s3.title: THE PLAN
s3.desc: A tailored intervention proposal. Who does what, when, at what cost. If it doesn’t convince, no commitment.

s4.title: THE EXECUTION
s4.desc: Hub, Partners, Friends: each plays their part. Minerva coordinates. Periodic reports, clear governance.

s5.title: THE REVIEW
s5.desc: Quarterly Council Meeting. Performance, strategy, governance. It’s not a service: it’s a relationship.

soluzioni.casesTitle: Every case is unique. Here are some examples.

c1.title: THE ENTREPRENEUR WHO SELLS
c1.situazione: Entrepreneur, 63 years old, machinery company, €25M revenue, no succession plan.
c1.soluzione: Multidisciplinary valuation → pre-sale preparation (12 months) → M&A sell-side process → closing at 8.5x multiple → post-exit wealth management → family governance to manage liquidity.
c1.team: Hub involved: M&A + WM. Partners: legal + tax. Duration: 24 months.

c2.title: THE GROWING FAMILY
c2.situazione: Family with 3 branches, 8 properties, 2 companies, €40M estate, zero governance. Growing conflicts.
c2.soluzione: Complete estate diagnosis → family constitution → governance with Board → real estate rationalisation → Next Gen programme for 3 heirs → consolidated wealth management.
c2.team: Hub: Strategy + WM + RE. Partners: legal + tax. Friends: family mediator. Duration: 18 months + ongoing.

c3.title: THE PROFESSIONAL WHO PLANS
c3.situazione: Surgeon, 55 years old, high income, 3 properties, scattered investments, zero succession planning. No time for anything.
c3.soluzione: Estate X-ray → banking consolidation (from 4 to 2 relationships, fees -40%) → holding structure → trust for protection → quarterly reporting.
c3.team: Hub: WM. Partners: tax + insurance. Duration: 6 months setup + ongoing.

left.label: FOR THOSE WITH WEALTH:
left.desc: One point of contact instead of 7. More results, less time, lower costs.

right.label: FOR THOSE WHO WANT TO JOIN:
right.desc: An ecosystem where your work is amplified. Deal flow, clients, co-investment.

abilitatori.headline: The ecosystem’s tools.
abilitatori.subtitle: It’s not just who we are. It’s what we make available.

bacheca.title: The Board
bacheca.subtitle: Off-market deals. Reserved. Filtered.
bacheca.desc: Transactions that don’t exist on the open market. Reserved disposals, private portfolios, pre-auction opportunities. Every entry is filtered by the Investment Committee. Access is reserved for ecosystem members.

portale.title: The Portal
portale.subtitle: Dashboard. Digital NDAs. Tracking. Matching.
portale.desc: The ecosystem’s digital infrastructure. Each member accesses their own reserved portal: active deals, documents, performance, governance. Automatic NDAs, access tracking, intelligent matching between opportunities and profiles.

coinvolgimento.title: Active Involvement of Everyone, Including the Client
coinvolgimento.desc: It’s not just Minerva that moves. Every ecosystem actor can explore, contribute, originate, invest.

wealth.subtitle: Wealth management is not an add-on service. It’s the reason everything else exists.

c1.title: Strategic Asset Allocation
c1.desc: Life goals, not market trends. Liquid, illiquid, real assets.

c2.title: Banking Optimisation
c2.desc: From 4 banks to 2. Fees reduced by 40%. The bank works for you.

c3.title: Succession Planning
c3.desc: Trusts, pacts, donations, holdings. Integrated into a single design.

c4.title: Asset Protection
c4.desc: Segregation, asset protection, managing invisible risks.

c5.title: Consolidated Reporting
c5.desc: All positions, all banks, one report. Because you can’t manage what you can’t see.

c6.title: Post-Exit Wealth Strategy
c6.desc: From liquidity to structured wealth. Diversification, protection, governance. The most important thing: don’t lose what you’ve earned.

s1.desc: of advisory in Italy is commission-based

s3.desc: inefficiencies found on average per new client

wealth.quote: We have no products. We have no conflicts. We have a fee, a plan and a report.

codice.label: The Minerva Code
codice.opening: Your security and ours: operate and sleep peacefully.
codice.headline: Three codes. One rule: excellence without compromise.
codice.subtitle: Every professional signs the Minerva Code before operating. Three binding documents that define how we work, how value is distributed and how clients are protected.

etico.title: Ethical Code
etico.intro: The non-negotiable principles that govern every relationship in the ecosystem.

p1.title: Absolute confidentiality
p1.desc: Every piece of information is protected. No data is shared without the client's explicit authorisation.

p2.title: Verifiable credibility
p2.desc: Every professional is selected by track record, references and consistency between what they say and what they do.

p3.title: Total transparency
p3.desc: The client always knows who works for them, how much it costs and why. No hidden conflicts of interest.

remunerativo.title: Compensation Code
remunerativo.intro: How value is distributed. Clear, documented, aligned.

p1.title: Waterfall structure
p1.desc: The compensation flow follows a defined cascade: first the client, then those who generated value, then the platform.

p2.title: Documented split
p2.desc: Every allocation is written, signed and accessible. The client sees exactly who receives what.

p3.title: Aligned interests
p3.desc: Fees are structured to reward results, not activity. Those who generate value participate in value.

operativo.title: Operational Code
operativo.intro: How we work. Processes, standards, accountability.

p1.title: Standardised processes
p1.desc: Every operation follows a defined workflow: onboarding, due diligence, execution, reporting.

p2.title: Binding SLAs
p2.desc: Response times, deliverable quality and update frequency are measured and guaranteed.

p3.title: Compliance checklist
p3.desc: Before every operation, a checklist verifies that all requirements are met. No exceptions.

codice.sanzioniIntro: The Code is not a decorative document. Those who fail to meet standards are sanctioned through a graduated and transparent system.

s1.title: Formal warning
s1.desc: First documented report with request for compliance.

s2.title: Temporary suspension
s2.desc: Exclusion from new operations for a defined period.

s3.title: Role review
s3.desc: Reduction of responsibilities and access areas.

s4.title: Permanent exclusion
s4.desc: Definitive exit from the ecosystem. Irreversible.

trasparenza.label: Transparency
trasparenza.headline: Trust is built with facts
trasparenza.subtitle: Every aspect of the relationship is documented, traceable and verifiable. No grey areas.

fee.title: Transparent fees
fee.desc: You know what you pay and who receives it. Every fee is documented, every split is visible. No hidden costs, no undisclosed commissions.

details.d2: Split between Hub, Partner and Advisor always visible
details.d3: No hidden kickbacks or double commissions
details.d4: Periodic report with detailed costs incurred

audit.title: Audit trail
audit.desc: Every action is tracked. Who did what, when and why. An immutable record that protects the client and ensures accountability at all levels.

details.d1: Complete log of every interaction and decision
details.d2: Timestamp and responsible party for every step
details.d3: History accessible to the client at any time
details.d4: Basis for the quarterly Partner scorecard

nda.title: Digital NDAs
nda.desc: Qualified electronic signature, automatic NDAs before any exchange of sensitive information. Your deal will never be burned. Discretion is a founding principle.

details.d1: NDA automatically generated before data access
details.d2: Qualified electronic signature with legal validity
details.d3: Controlled and revocable access at any time
details.d4: Tracking of who viewed which documents

dichiarazione.title: Mandatory declaration
dichiarazione.desc: Every professional in the ecosystem declares conflicts of interest, prior relationships and potentially incompatible positions. Before operating, not after.

details.d1: Preventive declaration of conflicts of interest
details.d3: Mandatory update with every new engagement
details.d4: Independent verification by the Compliance Officer

selezione.label: Selection
selezione.headline: Joining the ecosystem is not a right. It is a privilege to be earned.
selezione.subtitle: We select people, not CVs. Every professional is evaluated for expertise, values and ability to contribute.

c1.title: Verifiable track record
c1.desc: Concrete, measurable, referenceable results. Credentials are not enough: facts are required.

c2.title: Integrity and confidentiality
c2.desc: Discretion is not optional. Those who enter the ecosystem protect information as if it were their own.

c3.title: Complementarity
c3.desc: We seek expertise that completes the mosaic, not duplicates it. Every entry must expand our reach.

c4.title: Cultural alignment
c4.desc: Sharing the values of the Minerva Code is not optional. It is the prerequisite for working together.

c5.title: Willingness to contribute
c5.desc: We don't seek spectators. We seek professionals who bring active value to the ecosystem.

s1.title: Referral
s1.desc: An ecosystem member introduces the candidate to Minerva. No unsolicited access.

s2.title: Assessment
s2.desc: Thorough verification of expertise, references, track record and cultural compatibility.

s3.title: Invitation
s3.desc: If the assessment is positive, the candidate receives a formal invitation to sign the Minerva Code.

s4.title: Proposal
s4.desc: Definition of role, areas of expertise and terms of collaboration.

selezione.exitText: The ecosystem is alive. Those who don't generate value, who don't meet standards, who aren't aligned with principles, are shown the door. No exceptions.

eventi.label: Minerva Events
eventi.headline: Where relationships become opportunities
eventi.subtitle: 8-10 events per year. Exclusive meetings between entrepreneurs, families and selected professionals.

deal.title: Deal Night
deal.desc: Presentation of selected operations in a reserved format. Entrepreneurs, investors and advisors meet around concrete deals, already structured and ready for evaluation.

fundraising.title: Fundraising Support
fundraising.desc: Sessions dedicated to entrepreneurs seeking capital. Structured pitches before qualified ecosystem investors, with support in preparation and follow-up.

deep.title: Thematic Deep Dive
deep.desc: Deep dives on strategic topics: generational succession, family governance, international taxation, sector trends. Top-tier speakers, small groups.

dinner.title: Networking Dinner
dinner.desc: Reserved dinners in exclusive locations. No formal agenda: the value lies in the quality of conversations and the relationships that emerge spontaneously.

pointZero.label: Point Zero
pointZero.headline: Point Zero
pointZero.subtitle: The most exclusive club in the ecosystem. Invitation only. Where decisions take shape.
pointZero.hotSeatDesc: One member sits at the centre. They present their situation, wealth, business, family. The others listen, question, challenge. No filters, no diplomacy. Only brutal honesty and expertise at the service of those brave enough to be exposed.

r1.title: Absolute confidentiality
r1.desc: What is said in the room, stays in the room. No exceptions, no interpretations.

r2.title: Active contribution
r2.desc: Participants don't observe: they contribute. Every member brings experience, relationships and perspectives.

r3.title: No selling
r3.desc: No commercial pitches, no disguised sales. The space is dedicated to dialogue, not business development.

r4.title: Brutal honesty
r4.desc: The group's value lies in its ability to tell the truth. Even when it's uncomfortable. Especially when it's uncomfortable.

criteri.c1: Direct invitation from an existing member or the Minerva team
criteri.c2: Wealth and complexity sufficient to benefit from peer dialogue
criteri.c3: Willingness to be exposed and receive direct feedback
criteri.c4: Signature of the Minerva Code and respect of the 4 rules
criteri.c5: Commitment to actively attend at least 70% of meetings

pointZero.membriDesc: The number is intentionally limited. Every voice matters, every relationship is deep. It's not a network: it's a circle of trust.

nextGen.label: Next Gen <> Gen Exit
nextGen.headline: Next Gen <> Gen Exit
nextGen.subtitle: Generational transition has two protagonists. Not one.
nextGen.intro: Everyone talks about preparing the next generation. Nobody prepares those who need to let go. Generational transition is not an event: it's a two-way process. Those entering must learn to lead. Those exiting must learn to let go. Minerva accompanies both.

nextGen.title: NEXT GEN
nextGen.text: Learn the language of wealth. Build skills, relationships and awareness before inheriting responsibility. Don't undergo the transition: lead it.

genExit.title: GEN EXIT
genExit.text: Letting go doesn't mean losing. It means transforming your role: from decision-maker to mentor, from operational to strategic. Planning the exit with the same care used to build the entry.

nextGen.dialogoQuote: The <> in our name is not a symbol. It's a dialogue.
nextGen.beneficiLabel: Why it only works if it works for both

b1.title: Continuity without trauma
b1.desc: The transition happens gradually, not in one day. Those entering are ready. Those exiting are at peace.

b2.title: Skills that transfer
b2.desc: Not just knowledge, relationships, values, vision. The things you can't learn in a master's programme.

b3.title: Conflicts prevented
b3.desc: Generational tensions are addressed before they become fractures. With professional facilitation.

b4.title: Protected wealth
b4.desc: 70% of family businesses don't survive the second generation. The reason isn't financial: it's human.

b5.title: Redefined roles
b5.desc: The founder finds new meaning. The successor finds their own space. Nobody gets erased.

b6.title: Shared decisions
b6.desc: The most important choices are made together, in a structured context. Not at the dinner table on Christmas Eve.

intro.title: INTRO
intro.desc: First steps in understanding family wealth. Individual welcome session with Marco and Enrico. Basic workshops (2/year): reading a balance sheet, understanding investments. Networking with other next gens in the ecosystem.

develop.title: DEVELOP
develop.desc: Building skills and network. Mentorship with senior entrepreneurs from the network. Observational participation in Minerva Circle (1-2 events/year). Project work: involvement in a real deal as analyst. University partnerships.

accelerate.title: ACCELERATE
accelerate.desc: Preparation for family leadership. Seat at the table: active participation in family discussions. Board exposure: observer on boards of network companies. Investment track: opportunity to propose deals to the Club. Family governance: facilitated discussions with parents.

s1.title: REDEFINITION
s1.desc: Analysis of current role. Mapping of transferable skills. Definition of new profile: mentor, investor, advisor, ambassador.

s2.title: TRANSITION
s2.desc: Progressive support. Structured delegation. The founder remains present but in a different role, strategic, not operational.

s3.title: NEW CHAPTER
s3.desc: Wealth is in prepared hands. The founder is free to dedicate themselves to what matters: family, passions, legacy. It's not an ending: it's a transformation.

d1.title: Intergenerational Behavioural Finance
d1.desc: How different generations perceive risk, return and time. Cognitive biases of the founder vs biases of the successor. Interactive workshop where parents and children discover how they think differently, and why it's an advantage, not a problem.

d2.title: Family Governance Deep Dive
d2.desc: Family constitution, family pacts, roles and boundaries. How to separate emotional dynamics from wealth decisions. With specialised external facilitator. Parents and children at the same table.

d3.title: Mixed Deal Lab
d3.desc: A real operation (in blind form) analysed together by senior and junior. The senior brings experience and intuition. The junior brings data, models and fresh eyes. The result: a better analysis than either would have produced alone.

nova.title: NovaTalent
nova.desc: The global network of top talent under 35 selected by merit. Top 3% with higher education.

nextGen.cta: Contact us for the Next Gen <> Gen Exit programme

strategia.label: Strategy
strategia.headline: The context we operate in
strategia.subtitle: Numbers, models and processes that guide every decision.

europe.desc: Businesses transferred yearly in Europe, 150,000 at risk of closure

italy.desc: Of Italian companies are SMEs. 70% don't survive the second generation

france.desc: Of French companies are family-owned. Same fragilities, same urgency

wealth.desc: Italian private wealth, third in Europe

strategia.benchmarkClosing: Minerva is a rare hybrid combining Advisory + Deal + Community. Most platforms are only one of the three.
strategia.benchmarkSource: Comparative analysis of 50 global platforms, filtered by independence, open ecosystem, services beyond asset allocation, network presence.

p1.title: Listen
p1.desc: We understand the complexity: family, business, wealth, objectives. No solution before understanding.

p2.title: Architecture
p2.desc: We design the solution assembling the necessary competencies from the ecosystem.

p3.title: Execution
p3.desc: The dedicated team operates with defined SLAs, continuous reporting and accountability.

p4.title: Monitoring
p4.desc: Every operation is tracked, measured and evaluated. Quarterly scorecard for everyone.

p5.title: Evolution
p5.desc: Wealth changes, needs evolve. The model adapts continuously.

strategia.icDesc: An independent committee that evaluates every opportunity with rigour and discipline. Multidisciplinary composition, structured process.
strategia.icFasiLabel: The 6 phases of the decision process

f1.title: Screening
f1.desc: Preliminary assessment of the opportunity: sector, size, strategic fit.

f2.title: Due Diligence
f2.desc: In-depth analysis: financials, legal, commercial, management.

f3.title: IC Evaluation
f3.desc: Presentation to the Committee with recommendation and risk assessment.

f4.title: Resolution
f4.desc: Committee vote. Collegiate decision, documented and motivated.

f5.title: Structuring
f5.desc: Structure definition: SPV, governance, waterfall, timeline.

f6.title: Execution
f6.desc: Signing, closing, onboarding. Post-deal monitoring with periodic reporting.

clubDeal.label: Minerva Club Deal
clubDeal.headline: Invest together, with people you know
clubDeal.subtitle: Selected, structured and reserved operations. Accessible only to members of the Minerva ecosystem.
clubDeal.intro: The Minerva Club Deal is the vehicle through which clients and ecosystem members can co-invest in private equity, real estate and special situations. Every deal is originated, filtered and structured by the Minerva team, with transparent governance and exclusive access.

s1.title: Origination
s1.desc: The opportunity is identified by the team or the ecosystem network. Initial screening on sector, size and strategic fit.

s2.title: Due Diligence
s2.desc: In-depth analysis: financials, legal, commercial, management quality. The Minerva team coordinates all advisors involved.

s3.title: Structuring
s3.desc: Definition of the vehicle (SPV), governance, waterfall, minimum ticket, timeline. Complete documentation before fundraising.

s4.title: Fundraising
s4.desc: Blind presentation to qualified members. Digital NDA. Data room access. Subscription with electronic signature.

s5.title: Management and reporting
s5.desc: Continuous investment monitoring. Quarterly reporting. Exit strategy defined from the start.

vantaggi.v1: Access to off-market deals not available on the market
vantaggi.v2: Co-investment with verified entrepreneurs and professionals
vantaggi.v3: Transparent governance: dedicated SPV, documented waterfall
vantaggi.v4: Accessible tickets: participation even with contained amounts
vantaggi.v5: Professional due diligence already performed by the team
vantaggi.v6: Total alignment: Minerva invests in every deal

clubDeal.closing: Every club deal is an opportunity built with the same care we bring to wealth management.

hero.headline: A business is not just an asset. It's the story of those who built it.

gold.phrase: We are not intermediaries: we are architects of operations.
gold.subtext: Every deal creates internal competition, because only those who close earn reputation and fees.

cessioni.title: Disposals and business sales
cessioni.text: Market preparation, pre-sale valorization, strategic and financial buyer selection, negotiation and closing.

acquisizioni.title: Acquisitions and buy-side
acquisizioni.text: Target search, screening, industrial and financial due diligence, offer structuring.

aggregazioni.title: Aggregations and alliances
aggregazioni.text: Growth through external lines, joint ventures, industrial alliances.

ristrutturazione.title: Restructuring and turnaround
ristrutturazione.text: Capital interventions, debt renegotiation, operational reorganization.

capitale.title: Capital Structuring
capitale.text: Search, evaluation and structuring of equity and/or debt. Private placement, fundraising, bridge financing.

valutazione.title: Business Valuation
valutazione.text: Multidisciplinary approach: DCF, multiples, real options, scenario analysis. Not a number: a defensible range with 3 scenarios.

clubdeal.title: Club Deal*
clubdeal.text: When an operation is exceptional, we invest alongside the client with our own capital.

analisi.title: Strategic analysis and positioning
analisi.text: Competitive mapping, market analysis, definition of sustainable competitive advantage.

ottimizzazione.title: Operational optimization
ottimizzazione.text: Process efficiency, cost reduction, operating margin improvement.

businessplan.title: Business plan and preparation
businessplan.text: Industrial plan for extraordinary operations, fundraising, listing.

azienda.differentiator: We don't accept mandates we can't close. We don't burn operations. And when we propose a deal to the Club, we invest first.*
azienda.disclaimer: *Every co-investment operation is subject to prior validation by the Minerva Partners Investment Committee.

hero.headline: Real estate deserves the same care as business.

gold.phrase: Every property is an opportunity. Every operation is a project.
gold.subtext: We don't sell properties: we build real estate strategies integrated into the overall wealth.

acquisizioni.title: Off-market acquisitions
acquisizioni.text: Search, selection and negotiation of real estate assets with privileged access to reserved deals.

vendite.title: Sales and valorization
vendite.text: Market preparation, asset positioning, management of the disposal process.

fiscale.title: Tax structuring
fiscale.text: Optimization of real estate holding: vehicle companies, holdings, real estate trusts.

gestione.title: Portfolio management
gestione.text: Property management, yield analysis, strategic portfolio rotation.

mix.title: An integrated approach
mix.text: Real estate is not a separate compartment: we integrate it into the overall wealth strategy, coordinating tax, succession and financial aspects.

clubdeal.title: Real Estate Club Deal*
clubdeal.text: Selected operations in co-investment with our network of entrepreneurs and families.

palazzo.text: Historic building in city center: acquisition, renovation and division with 7-9% target yield.

studio.text: Mixed-use property: conversion from offices to premium residential in prime area.

ufficio.text: Diversified real estate portfolio: tax optimization and strategic asset rotation.

realEstate.differentiator: We are not real estate agents. We are advisors who integrate real estate into the overall wealth vision.
realEstate.disclaimer: *Every co-investment operation is subject to prior validation by the Minerva Partners Investment Committee.
realEstate.cta: Let's talk about your real estate

hero.headline: Financial wealth is not managed: it is governed.

gold.phrase: Fee-only. No conflicts. Only your interest.
gold.subtext: We receive no retrocessions, sell no products, have no distribution agreements. Pure advisory only.

advisory.title: Independent financial advisory
advisory.text: Analysis, selection and monitoring of investments without conflicts of interest. Fee-only.

bancario.title: Banking optimization
bancario.text: Audit of banking conditions, cost renegotiation, relationship consolidation.

protezione.title: Asset protection
protezione.text: Wealth protection structures: trusts, holdings, policies, segregation.

reporting.title: Consolidated reporting
reporting.text: Single integrated view of all assets: financial, real estate, business, alternatives.

ottimizzazione.title: Tax optimization
ottimizzazione.text: Investment tax planning, optimization of holding structures.

feeonly.title: The Fee-Only model
feeonly.text: Our remuneration is exclusively fee-based, agreed in advance and transparent. We receive no commissions from banks, asset managers or insurance companies. This eliminates all conflicts of interest and fully aligns our incentives with those of the client.

finanza.differentiator: We don't manage money. We don't custody assets. We provide the independent direction that was missing between you and those managing your money.

hero.headline: Family is the most complex wealth. And the most important.

gold.phrase: Where wealth ends and family begins, our most important work starts.
gold.subtext: Generational transition is not an event: it's a process that requires years of preparation and expert direction.

passaggio.title: Generational transition
passaggio.text: Planning and accompanying the transfer of responsibilities, competencies and wealth to the next generation.

governance.title: Family governance
governance.text: Establishment and management of family council, values charter, internal regulations.

mediazione.title: Family mediation
mediazione.text: Management of relational dynamics, prevention and resolution of conflicts, dialogue facilitation.

nextgen.title: Next Gen Program
nextgen.text: Training, mentoring and preparation of the new generation for the role of responsible shareholder.

patti.title: Family agreements
patti.text: Drafting and negotiation of shareholder agreements, family agreements, entry and exit rules.

protezione.title: Family protection
protezione.text: Trusts, policies, segregation structures to protect family wealth.

conflitti.label: of failures caused by family conflicts

ricchezza.label: of wealth lost by the 2nd generation

famiglia.differentiator: We're not psychologists, but we know that behind every wealth decision there's a family dynamic. And we manage it.

hero.headline: Passions are not a luxury. They are part of wealth.

gold.phrase: Every passion deserves the same care as an investment.
gold.subtext: Art, yachting, prestige properties, philanthropy: we manage what matters beyond numbers.

collezioni.title: Collections and art
collezioni.text: Advisory for acquisition, management and valorization of art collections, fine wines, vintage cars and valuables.

nautica.title: Yachting and aviation
nautica.text: Purchase, management and tax optimization of yachts and aircraft. Dedicated holding structures.

proprieta.title: Prestige properties
proprieta.text: Search, acquisition and management of premium residences in Italy and abroad.

filantropia.title: Structured philanthropy
filantropia.text: Design of philanthropic initiatives, foundations, planned donations with tax optimization.

concierge.title: Wealth concierge
concierge.text: A single point of reference for all needs related to lifestyle and personal wealth.

filosofia.title: Our philosophy
filosofia.text: Passions are not distractions from wealth: they are an integral part of it. We treat them with the same analytical rigor and care we reserve for financial and real estate investments.

passioni.differentiator: We don't sell experiences. We help you live your passions as part of a conscious wealth strategy.

hero.headline: The future of wealth is built today.

gold.phrase: Planning the future is not pessimism: it's responsibility.
gold.subtext: Wealth that is not transferred with a strategy is dissipated. Every generation has a duty to prepare the next.

successione.title: Succession planning
successione.text: Analysis of current situation, heir mapping, definition of transfer strategy.

trust.title: Trusts and fiduciaries
trust.text: Establishment and management of trusts, fiduciary mandates, asset protection structures.

transfer.title: Wealth transfer
transfer.text: Structured wealth transfer: donations, family agreements, intergenerational disposals.

legacy.title: Legacy planning
legacy.text: Definition of value and material legacy. What you want to leave and how you want to be remembered.

fiscale.title: Succession tax optimization
fiscale.text: Planning to minimize the tax impact of generational transfer.

filosofia.title: Our vision
filosofia.text: Wealth transfer is not an event but a process that lasts years. We accompany it with direction that integrates legal, tax, financial and — above all — family aspects.

futuro.differentiator: We don't prepare wills. We build bridges between generations, so wealth outlives those who created it.
